top.title: Israel seizes castle in Lebanon as it expands ground offensive
top.summary: Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu calls the capture of the strategic fortress a "decisive shift" in Israel's campaign against Hezbollah, as European governments criticise the escalation.

top.title: Colombia presidential runoff pits leftist senator against pro-Trump rival
top.summary: Left-wing senator Iván Cepeda will face Trump admirer Abelardo de la Espriella at the final ballot on 21 June.

top.title: Trump seeking edits to US-Iran deal, US media report
top.summary: The requested changes are related to the Strait of Hormuz and the removal of highly enriched uranium, according to US media.

top.title: 'Controversial' North Korean invasion setting for next Call of Duty game
top.summary: Developer Infinity Ward said the game will be "grounded in the military authenticity" the series is known for.

top.title: Humanoid robots 'the future' of car making, says BMW
top.summary: BMW is introducing humanoid robots to a car plant in Europe, building on similar projects in the US.

top.title: California Attorney General sues 23andMe successor for 2023 data breach
top.summary: Attorney General Rob Bonta alleges the company lied about the breach's severity.

title.#text: This is the Microsoft Surface Laptop Ultra with Nvidia RTX Spark
Nvidia announces RTX Spark as ‘the most efficient PC chip ever built’
AMD’s new pitch: our old tech is so good you should just keep using it
